assertion_results.text: Documentation includes all four HTTP methods: GET, POST, PUT, and DELETE
Each endpoint has a human-readable description explaining what it does
assertion_results.evidence: Minimal one-line descriptions without behavioral detail

assertion_results.text: Path parameters (e.g., :id) are documented with their type and constraints
assertion_results.evidence: Path parameter :id not documented with type or constraints

assertion_results.text: Query parameters for the list endpoint (page, limit) are documented with defaults
assertion_results.evidence: Page and limit mentioned with defaults

assertion_results.text: POST and PUT endpoints have request body schemas with field types and validation rules
Each endpoint includes at least one response example with realistic JSON data
Error responses are documented with status codes (400, 404, 409, 422) and response bodies
assertion_results.evidence: Only 404 and 409 mentioned inline without response bodies

assertion_results.text: An OpenAPI 3.0 JSON spec is produced with valid paths and component schemas
